content: It's pretty frustrating having home body kids. Taking them out anywhere is such a chore. To the point where it's not even fun. I still blame technology. It's too good. I can't compete. We are cancelling our holiday plans because the kids would rather stay at home. We are still going to try and find stuff to do but it'll be in Auckland. It's the smart thing to do but idk if it's good for them to have such limited life experiences. I just can't be fucked doing anything hard for a holiday
